public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as street physician.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a street physician still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of street physician in and around Unity Square, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Unity Square workable through the obligations of street physician while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Unity Square, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of street physician visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vale Tinmarch needs help with a problem in Unity Square that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Vale Tinmarch can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Vale Tinmarch carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Street Physician, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in The Union.
what_they_refuse: Vale Tinmarch refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Street Physician too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Vale Tinmarch can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Vale Tinmarch adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Vale Tinmarch is Known locally through day-to-day work as street physician. and rarely acts without a second motive.
